solution: 
```class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        prev_bit = n & 1
        while n > 0:
            n >>= 1
            if n & 1 == prev_bit:
                return False
            prev_bit = n & 1
        return True
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to efficiently check the alternating bits of the given number. It iterates through the bits of the number from right to left, keeping track of the previous bit. If it encounters a bit that is the same as the previous one, it immediately returns False. If it successfully checks all bits without finding any adjacent equal bits, it returns True. This approach has a high efficiency due to its use of bitwise operations, which are typically faster than arithmetic operations.
